name: Do I need a lawyer if Google AI buried my law firm's ranking after an update?
description: Yes, tech lawyer needed; AI can't reliably guide due to errors and evidence risks.[1][3]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer if Google AI buried my law firm's ranking after an update?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, tech lawyer needed; AI can't reliably guide due to errors and evidence risks.[1][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, consult a lawyer specializing in tech law, as self-representing risks mishandling complex AI evidence rules.[1][3] Lay analysis often fails due to hallucinations and privilege issues.[3] Key factors: Section 230 immunity, no ranking guarantees, discoverability traps.[1][6] Search for attorneys via traditional methods, avoid AI queries about them.[1] Early expert input maximizes options.
